'''ngangojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaltoprofen|zaltoprofen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaltoprofen|zaltoprofen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngangojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngængejeth|ngængejeth]] || [[word:ngængejej|ngængejej]] || [[word:ngængejesh|ngængejesh]] || [[word:ngængeje|ngængeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngangongojoth|ngangongojoth]] || [[word:ngangongojoj|ngangongojoj]] || [[word:ngangongojosh|ngangongojosh]] || [[word:ngangongojo|ngangongojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngangojoth|ngangojoth]] || [[word:ngangojoj|ngangojoj]] || [[word:ngangojosh|ngangojosh]] || [[word:ngangojo|ngangojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngangofjoth|ngangofjoth]] || [[word:ngangofjoj|ngangofjoj]] || [[word:ngangofjosh|ngangofjosh]] || [[word:ngangofjof|ngangofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngangojotho|ngangojotho]] || [[word:ngangojojo|ngangojojo]] || [[word:ngangojosho|ngangojosho]] || [[word:ngangojoko|ngangojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngangojoth|ngangojoth]] || [[word:ngangojoj|ngangojoj]] || [[word:ngangojosh|ngangojosh]] || [[word:ngangojo|ngangojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngangojothol|ngangojothol]] || [[word:ngangojojol|ngangojojol]] || [[word:ngangojoshol|ngangojoshol]] || [[word:ngangojokol|ngangojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngangojothotho|ngangojothotho]] || [[word:ngangojojojo|ngangojojojo]] || [[word:ngangojoshosho|ngangojoshosho]] || [[word:ngangojoko|ngangojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngangojothon|ngangojothon]] || [[word:ngangojojon|ngangojojon]] || [[word:ngangojoshon|ngangojoshon]] || [[word:ngangojokon|ngangojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngangojothoro|ngangojothoro]] || [[word:ngangojojoro|ngangojojoro]] || [[word:ngangojoshoro|ngangojoshoro]] || [[word:ngangojokoro|ngangojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
